title: Telona Origin Addon
description: Addon to origins mod (balans of official origins, and add new origins)
body:
### And download:
> [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge)

> [Caelus API](https://modrinth.com/mod/caelus)

> [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli)

> [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) - for 1.20.+

<details>

<summary>Russia</summary>

Этот аддон сбалансирует ванильные происхождения мода origins, а так же добавит некоторые новые. С этим аддоном станет интереснее и сложнее играть

(До полного баланса основныйх происхождений, аддон официально поддерживает только версию 1.20.1, но теоретически, может запускаться с версии 1.13 и выше)

Аддон создаётся с использованием конструктора [MGZ](https://www.mathgeniuszach.com/apps/origin-creator/)

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>English</summary>

This addon will balance vanilla origins of the origins mod, and also add some new ones. With this addon it will become more interesting and difficult to play

(Until the main origins are fully balanced, the addon officially supports only version 1.20.1, but theoretically, it can be launched with version 1.13 and higher)

The addon is created using the constructor [MGZ](https://www.mathgeniuszach.com/apps/origin-creator/)


</details>


<details>
<summary>New origins</summary>

# Ready:
- Elf
- Shulked elf
- Aquoid
- Amphibian
- Wither skeleton

# In progress:
- Sculk burn (balancing)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Redacted origins</summary>

# Ready:
- Arachnid (hes small, and other arachnids hes new neutral)
- Avian (hes small)
- Enderian (hes height)
- Shulk (is balanced)
- Elytrian (unic texture for elytra)
- Phantom (dont transparent)
- Blazeburn (get lava vision, and blazes its hes neutral)

# In progress:
- Felin (hes small)

# Dont redacted:

# Deleted:
- Merlin

</details>
